name: testCancelDeletingFraudControl
description: Delete Fraud Control with Cancel buttonDelete Fraud Control with 'Cross'Delete Fraud Control with ESC
descriptionHtml: Delete Fraud Control with Cancel buttonDelete Fraud Control with 'Cross'Delete Fraud Control with ESC

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Delete Fraud Control with Cancel buttonDelete Fraud Control with 'Cross'Delete Fraud Control with ESC

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click on the 'Cancel' button to close form
Verify that due to click Cancel button Fraud Control hasn't been deleted
Click on the 'Close' icon to close form
Verify that due to click Cross icon Fraud Control hasn't been deleted
Verify that due to press ESC keyboard button Fraud Control hasn't been deleted
